Dialog.name: MSG_STOP_MITSURU_0430
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}You do know why I called you here today, correct? I'm not letting you leave just yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_STOP_MITSURU_0613
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We need you to lead the team. Get ready to head in and explore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_STOP_0131
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's no turning back now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HELP_GET_OUT_HERE1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Dark Hour will soon be over.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HELP_GET_OUT_HERE2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Returning to the dorm now means that[n]time will advance to the next day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HELP_GET_OUT_HERE3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should we stop exploring for tonight?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_END_EXPLORATION
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We agreed to stop exploring[n]and return to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EXIT_JUNPEI_STOP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2007 0 0}Hey now, where are you goin'? That's the wrong way, dude.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_NOT_FINISH_INSTALL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}To proceed, the installation must be complete.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_INSTALL_CANCEL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You will now return to the game. Please wait until your game data is ready. Do not forget to save your game if you want to stop playing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_START_MITSURU_NotFul
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}I personally recommend bringing a full party whenever possible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_START_MITSURU_OK_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}You've currently explored up to floor {f 2 4 0}. Where do you want to resume the expedition?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_START_MITSURU_OK_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}As long as you follow my instructions, I'll be able to point you down a safe route.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_START_MITSURU_OK_11
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Floor {f 2 4 0}, you said? Understood. The teleporter should take you there right away.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Stay safe out there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_START_FUKA_OK_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5145 0 0}Are you ready to start exploring?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_START_FUKA_NotFull
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5145 0 0}Are you ready to start exploring?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, um... Are you sure you don't want to bring a full party? Will you be okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_START_FUKA_OK_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Looks like you've made it to floor {f 2 4 0}. Where would you like to jump to now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_START_FUKA_OK_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Please be careful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_START_FUKA_OK_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll find a safe route for you to traverse, so just follow my directions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_START_FUKA_OK_11
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}You want to go to floor {f 2 4 0}? Okay, if you take the teleporter, you'll be there before you know it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_THEURGIA_FUKA_OK_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll try to guide you to a more stable floor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll also support you from here, so please keep an ear out while you explore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_STOP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4104 0 0}Wait. Let's stop here for tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We have a long road ahead of us. Let's not push ourselves too hard today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ADVICE_MITSURU_APRIL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4077 0 0}Let's discuss our first goal for this exploration.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}According to our research, Tartarus is divided into several different regions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If we continue to climb the tower, then we'll eventually reach a spot that leads to a new area.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Reaching that spot should be our first goal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ADVICE_MITSURU_APRIL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Remember, don't push yourself too hard. You can always use the teleporters to return.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}You can always go back to the highest floor you've reached that day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ADVICE_MITSURU_APRIL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you ever find yourselves in danger, don't hesitate to use them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ADVICE_MITSURU_APRIL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}That's all from my end. Good luck.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_ADVICE_APRIL_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you return to the entrance mid-exploration, you can resume from the highest floor you've reached that day with Mitsuru's help. Plan wisely to explore more efficiently.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Because Tartarus changes daily, you can only travel to the highest floor on the same day. If you come on another day, you'll have to travel through the floors you've already visited again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ADVICE_MITSURU_MAY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4073 0 0}There's something I need to tell you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Do you remember what I said? About Tartarus being divided into different areas?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I sense a strange presence beyond the 20th floor... I believe that's where a new area begins.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It feels as if something is on the move...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let's investigate. I want to confirm what's there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ADVICE_FUKA_MAY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5074 0 0}Leader, there's something you need to know.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Tartarus seems to be split up into several different areas.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sensing an anomaly on one of those floors that acts as the border between two areas.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}It seems kind of erratic, like it's about to move or something...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}From what I can pick up, it seems to be around the 22nd floor. Do you mind checking it out?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Stay safe, and good luck.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_VELVET_YUKARI_STOP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}Everything okay? We're all ready to head out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Um... Is there something over there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_VELVET_TAR_1ST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Yukari[n]and the others can see it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_ACCESS_CLOCK_FIRST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What a large clock... It doesn't[n]seem to be working though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_ACCESS_CLOCK_FIRST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The clocks in Tartarus can {f 0 1 2}fully restore HP and SP{f 0 1 27} for all party members. {f 0 1 2}7{f 0 1 27} {f 4 4 1 0 1 0}s are required to activate the clock once. Use the clock to make exploring more efficient.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ACCESS_CLOCK_FIRST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Using the clock in Tartarus will fully restore everyone's HP and SP.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Although utilizing the clock will cost {f 4 4 1 0 1 0}s, it should help with exploring when used effectively.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Clock_NotItemHave
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The clock's not ticking... Maybe the hands[n]will start moving if I use something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Clock_YesItemHave
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The clock is reacting to the[n]{f 4 4 1 0 1 0}s...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_Clock_Error
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 1}{f 0 1 27} {f 4 4 1 0 1 0}s are required to activate the clock.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_MEDAL_NOT_ENOUGH
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let me see how many {f 4 4 1 0 1 0}s[n]I have... {f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 2}{f 0 1 27}. I don't have enough...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_WHAT_DO_YOU_WANT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have {f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 2}{f 0 1 27} {f 4 4 1 0 1 0}s[n]at the moment. Perhaps I should[n]use {f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 1}{f 0 1 27} to activate the clock...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_ClockAwake
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The clock started ticking...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HEAL_DONE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Everyone's HP and SP has been restored![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HEAL_NOMORE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Nobody seems to need[n]any healing right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HEAL_REQUIRE_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I use {f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 1}{f 0 1 27} {f 4 4 1 0 1 0}s[n]to heal everyone? I currently have {f 2 4 2}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SILVER_DOOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a silver door...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Is this the door Elizabeth was talking about?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I think she said her older sister would[n]be there... Let's try heading inside.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EXIT_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5143 0 0}Do you want to return to the dorm?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EXIT_FUKA_OK_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}Okay, then. Good work, everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EXIT_FUKA_NO_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}All right, but please be careful not to overdo it, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EXIT_FUKA_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5143 0 0}Oh, did you want to go back to the dorm?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EXIT_FUKA_NO_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}All right. I'll be right here if you need me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EXIT_FUKA_OK_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}Got it. Then let's try to rest up while we can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EXIT_FUKA_NO_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}Okay... Then let's do what we came here for.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_GREET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10099 0 0}Thanks to Yamagishi, I can explore with you too. But I'd still like to stick to the four-person strategy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10100 0 0}Just so we have backup or anyone who can come to our aid in the event of an emergency.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10101 0 0}And don't forget what happened during the last full moon. We can't leave Yamagishi alone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10102 0 0}I'll leave it up to you to decide on the party members. I know you can handle it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_GREET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10103 0 0}I'll do everything I can to help. Let's give it our best![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HealClock1stAccess
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the same clock as the one in[n]the Desert of Doors... I wonder[n]if it functions the same way.[n]{f 1 1}
